Collocation: dominate the market;dominate a conversation;dominate the game
Example_EN: Large companies continue to dominate the phone market.
Example_CN: 大公司继续主导手机市场。

Collocation: raw material supplier;local supplier;find a supplier
Example_EN: We need a reliable supplier for office paper.
Example_CN: 我们需要可靠的办公用纸供应商。

Example_EN: She won first prize in the writing contest.
Example_CN: 她在写作比赛中获一等奖。

Example_EN: Lessons typically last about forty-five minutes.
Example_CN: 课程通常持续大约四十五分钟。

Example_EN: Teenagers often care about what their peers think.
Example_CN: 青少年常常在意同龄人怎么想。

Example_EN: She lives on a state pension after retirement.
Example_CN: 她退休后靠国家养老金生活。

Example_EN: The bird stretched its wings and flew away.
Example_CN: 那只鸟展开翅膀飞走了。

Example_EN: Language acquisition is faster in early childhood.
Example_CN: 语言习得在幼儿期更快。

Collocation: burst of laughter;roar with laughter;share laughter
Example_EN: The joke caused a burst of laughter in the room.
Example_CN: 那个笑话引起屋里一阵笑声。

Example_EN: Parents are deeply concerned about school safety.
Example_CN: 家长对校园安全深感担忧。

Example_EN: She received public recognition for her research.
Example_CN: 她因研究获得了公众认可。

Example_EN: The storm cut off electricity for several hours.
Example_CN: 暴风雨导致断电数小时。

Example_EN: Please ask for assistance if you cannot open the door.
Example_CN: 打不开门请寻求帮助。

Collocation: on the roof;roof of the house;flat roof
Example_EN: Rain leaked through a hole in the roof.
Example_CN: 雨水从屋顶的一个洞漏进来。

Example_EN: He plans to travel a lot after retirement.
Example_CN: 他计划退休后经常旅行。

Collocation: A and B respectively;ranked first and second respectively
Example_EN: Tom and Lily finished first and second respectively.
Example_CN: 汤姆和莉莉分别获得第一和第二名。

Example_EN: There is wide variation in house prices across the city.
Example_CN: 全市房价差别很大。

Example_EN: The team ultimately decided to cancel the trip.
Example_CN: 团队最终决定取消旅行。

Example_EN: You need proof of identity to open a bank account.
Example_CN: 开户需要身份证明。

Example_EN: Vegetables grow well in rich soil.
Example_CN: 蔬菜在肥沃土壤中长得好。

Example_EN: That was a smart decision under pressure.
Example_CN: 那是压力下的明智决定。

Example_EN: Add a layer of cheese on the pasta.
Example_CN: 在意面上加一层奶酪。

Example_EN: She felt upset when she missed the last bus.
Example_CN: 错过末班车时她很沮丧。

Example_EN: Remember to brush your teeth twice a day.
Example_CN: 记得每天刷两次牙。

Example_EN: Every team needs fair representation in the meeting.
Example_CN: 每个团队都应在会议上得到公平代表。

Example_EN: Good preparation makes the interview less stressful.
Example_CN: 充分准备让面试压力小些。

Collocation: labour dispute;settle a dispute;dispute a claim
Example_EN: The two companies settled the dispute quietly.
Example_CN: 两家公司悄悄解决了争端。

Collocation: meeting agenda;set the agenda;on the agenda
Example_EN: Climate change is high on the political agenda.
Example_CN: 气候变化在政治议程上很靠前。

Example_EN: The course places emphasis on practical skills.
Example_CN: 该课程强调实践技能。

Example_EN: I bought the new edition of the textbook.
Example_CN: 我买了这本教材的新版。

Example_EN: She won a silver medal at the national games.
Example_CN: 她在全国运动会上获得银牌。

Example_EN: The festival offers free live entertainment each evening.
Example_CN: 艺术节每晚提供免费现场娱乐。

Example_EN: Please give me an honest answer about the delay.
Example_CN: 请如实告诉我延误的原因。

Example_EN: The company will undertake a major safety review.
Example_CN: 公司将开展一次重大安全审查。

Example_EN: Retail sales rose sharply during the holiday season.
Example_CN: 假日季零售额大幅上升。

Example_EN: A broken wire caused the lamp to stop working.
Example_CN: 一根断线导致灯不亮了。

Example_EN: It is unlikely to rain before noon.
Example_CN: 中午以前不太可能下雨。

Example_EN: The law protects the equal rights of gay people.
Example_CN: 法律保护同性恋者的平等权利。
MemoryTip: 现代多用 gay 指同性恋。

Example_EN: His research appeared in a major scientific publication.
Example_CN: 他的研究发表在一份重要科学刊物上。

Example_EN: There is only a slight difference between the two plans.
Example_CN: 两个方案只有细微差别。

Example_EN: The delay was caused by an unknown technical fault.
Example_CN: 延误由未知技术故障引起。

Example_EN: The new law provides a clearer legal framework.
Example_CN: 新法提供了更清晰的法律框架。

Example_EN: This street is a no-parking zone during peak hours.
Example_CN: 高峰时段这条街是禁停区。

Example_EN: The school will restrict access to the lab after 6 p.m.
Example_CN: 学校将限制晚上六点后进入实验室。

Collocation: leave a trace;trace of;trace the call
Example_EN: Police tried to trace the missing package.
Example_CN: 警方试图追踪丢失的包裹。

Example_EN: The photograph is six inches wide.
Example_CN: 这张照片宽六英寸。

Example_EN: One euro is roughly equivalent to about one dollar.
Example_CN: 一欧元大约相当于一美元。

Example_EN: There is solid evidence that exercise improves sleep.
Example_CN: 有确凿证据表明运动改善睡眠。

Example_EN: Small enterprise plays a key role in the local economy.
Example_CN: 小企业在当地经济中起关键作用。

Example_EN: The hospital provides free checks for elderly patients.
Example_CN: 这家医院为老年病人提供免费检查。

Example_EN: I still owe him twenty pounds from last week.
Example_CN: 我上周还欠他二十英镑。

Example_EN: The state governor announced a new education plan.
Example_CN: 州长宣布了新的教育计划。

Example_EN: Students must wear school uniform on weekdays.
Example_CN: 学生平日须穿校服。

Example_EN: The ship arrived at the port early this morning.
Example_CN: 船今天一早到达港口。

Example_EN: The match will be played on the home pitch.
Example_CN: 比赛将在主场球场进行。

Example_EN: Please check the arrival time before you leave home.
Example_CN: 出门前请核对到达时间。

Example_EN: The museum has a large collection of contemporary art.
Example_CN: 这家博物馆收藏大量当代艺术作品。

Example_EN: Passengers should go to gate twelve now.
Example_CN: 旅客现在应前往12号登机口。

Example_EN: She passed the driving test with ease.
Example_CN: 她轻松通过了驾驶考试。

Collocation: a glass of beer;beer bottle;craft beer
Example_EN: He ordered a cold beer after the long walk.
Example_CN: 长途步行后他点了一杯冰啤酒。

Example_EN: You should see a specialist about that knee pain.
Example_CN: 膝盖疼你应看专科医生。

Example_EN: I assure you that the package will arrive tomorrow.
Example_CN: 我向你保证包裹明天会到。

Collocation: user profile;high profile;keep a low profile
Example_EN: Please update your user profile with a new photo.
Example_CN: 请用新照片更新用户简介。

Collocation: in a good mood;mood swing;change the mood
Example_EN: She was in a good mood after receiving the news.
Example_CN: 收到消息后她心情很好。

Example_EN: I watched the final episode of the series last night.
Example_CN: 我昨晚看了该剧的大结局。

Collocation: crack in the wall;crack a joke;crack open
Example_EN: There is a long crack in the kitchen wall.
Example_CN: 厨墙壁上有一道长裂缝。

Example_EN: She has visited the museum numerous times.
Example_CN: 她已多次参观这家博物馆。

Example_EN: Please submit your application before Friday.
Example_CN: 请在周五前提交申请。

Example_EN: Fever is a common symptom of many infections.
Example_CN: 发烧是许多感染的常见症状。

Example_EN: It is virtually impossible to finish in one hour.
Example_CN: 一小时内完成几乎不可能。

Example_EN: We live in the digital era of instant messages.
Example_CN: 我们生活在即时通讯的数字时代。

Example_EN: The story received wide news coverage last week.
Example_CN: 上周这则新闻报道很广。

Example_EN: Political tension rose after the close election.
Example_CN: 竞选接近后政治紧张加剧。

Example_EN: Please unplug the power cable before cleaning.
Example_CN: 清洁前请拔掉电源线。

Example_EN: Please avoid asking sensitive personal questions.
Example_CN: 请避免问敏感的私人问题。

Example_EN: He felt nervous before the job interview.
Example_CN: 求职面试前他很紧张。

Example_EN: The team seeks input from teachers and parents.
Example_CN: 团队征求教师和家长的意见。

Example_EN: Doctors may isolate patients with infectious diseases.
Example_CN: 医生可能隔离传染病患者。

Collocation: political prisoner;release a prisoner;prisoner of war
Example_EN: The government released several political prisoners.
Example_CN: 政府释放了若干政治犯。

Example_EN: New filters help eliminate dust from the air.
Example_CN: 新过滤器有助于清除空气中的灰尘。

Example_EN: We are working on a very tight schedule this week.
Example_CN: 我们本周日程很紧。

Example_EN: Don't go out in wet clothes or you may catch a cold.
Example_CN: 别穿着湿衣服出门，免得感冒。

Example_EN: English is taught in every secondary school here.
Example_CN: 这里每所中学都教英语。

Example_EN: The council cares about the welfare of local children.
Example_CN: 议会关心当地儿童的福祉。

Example_EN: The hospital needs to recruit more nurses this year.
Example_CN: 医院今年需要招聘更多护士。

Example_EN: Do not exclude quieter students from group work.
Example_CN: 不要把安静的学生排除在小组活动外。

Example_EN: Tie the box with a piece of strong string.
Example_CN: 用结实的绳子把箱子捆好。

Example_EN: Dark clouds gathered before the heavy rain.
Example_CN: 大雨前乌云聚集。

Collocation: persuade someone to;persuade into;hard to persuade
Example_EN: Can you persuade him to join our study group?
Example_CN: 你能说服他加入我们的学习小组吗？

Example_EN: Her success continues to inspire young athletes.
Example_CN: 她的成功持续激励着年轻运动员。

Example_EN: The hotel held a grand opening last weekend.
Example_CN: 酒店上周末举行了盛大开业典礼。

Collocation: hence the need;two years hence;hence why
Example_EN: The road is flooded, hence the long delay.
Example_CN: 道路被淹，因此延误很久。

Chinese: 全体船员；一组工作人员
Example_EN: The cabin crew asked passengers to fasten seat belts.
Example_CN: 乘务组请乘客系好安全带。

Example_EN: Northern lights are a rare natural phenomenon.
Example_CN: 北极光是罕见的自然现象。

Collocation: primary school pupil;bright pupil;enlarge the pupil
Example_EN: Each pupil must bring a notebook to class.
Example_CN: 每个学生上课须带笔记本。

Example_EN: The website spread false information about the storm.
Example_CN: 该网站传播了关于风暴的虚假信息。

Example_EN: Volunteers assist with guiding visitors around the museum.
Example_CN: 志愿者协助引导游客参观博物馆。

Example_EN: Workers will restore the old bridge next year.
Example_CN: 工人们明年将修复这座旧桥。

Example_EN: You can solve the problem with this simple formula.
Example_CN: 你可以用这个简单公式解题。

Example_EN: We may need to alter our plans if it rains.
Example_CN: 如果下雨我们可能得改计划。
